commands.description: Assess requirements, ground codebase patterns, write implementation plan and wait for confirmation.
Trigger tdd-guide to write tests-first before implementing clean code edits.
Check compilation status, isolate type errors, and apply surgical compilation fixes.
Audit modified git files against security, quality, and project styling rules.
Scan the codebase for credentials leaks, SQL injections, XSS, and unvalidated paths.
Run doc-updater to index file changes, generate fresh AST codemaps under docs/CODEMAPS/.
Scan workspace with knip or depcheck to clean dead code and consolidate exports.
Commit current working changes to git with detailed, descriptive message.
Output active token usage metrics, dollar expenditures, and savings ratio telemetry.
List all active local agent sessions, workspace profiles, and context nodes.
